active_ingredients: Active ingredient (each gram contains) Bacitracin 500 units
indications_and_usage: Uses first aid to help prevent infection in: • minor cuts • scrapes • burns
dosage_and_administration: Directions • clean the affected area • apply a small amount of this product (an amount equal to the surface area of the tip of a finger) on the area 1 to 3 times daily • may be covered with a sterile bandage
